texts.t002: Motorised and manual rolling shutters engineered in Mumbai — galvanised steel, aluminium, perforated, grille and transparent polycarbonate curtains for shopfronts, warehouses and industry.
texts.t014: 18/20/22-gauge galvanised steel slats with pressed guides and heavy-duty springs — the workhorse for warehouses, factories and market shopfronts.
texts.t015: Corrosion-free extruded aluminium slats, single or double wall, powder-coated in RAL shades for premium storefronts and coastal sites.
texts.t016: Full-length transparent polycarbonate shutter — 100% Indian-make, virtually unbreakable, lets your display sell even after closing hours.
texts.t017: Ventilated punched-slat and rod-grille curtains that combine security with visibility and airflow for malls and parking.
texts.t018: Tubular and side motors with manual override, remote/RFID/mobile control, photocells and bottom safety edges.
texts.t019: Can my existing manual shutter be automated?
texts.t020: What slat gauges do you offer?
texts.t021: Yes — most manual shutters in good mechanical condition can be retrofitted with a side motor or tubular motor with manual override, remotes and safety accessories.
texts.t022: GI shutters are supplied in 18, 20 and 22 gauge; aluminium in single-wall and insulated double-wall profiles, sized to your opening.
texts.t030: Rapid roll PVC doors up to 100 RPM-class SIE40–SIE100 motors for hygiene, logistics and cold chain.
texts.t031: Insulated overhead sectional doors, stacking doors and residential garage automation with SIE16/36 openers.
texts.t032: Swing & sliding gate automation — 21 swing motor models, telescopic and cantilever systems.
texts.t033: Get a same-day recommendation for rolling shutters
texts.t034: Share your opening size and a photo — our Mumbai engineering desk replies with the right system and budget.
